ASV-ADDRESSABLE SAM
Current addressable annual value

runs.text: = annual TAM × vessel share × role share

text_body.plain_text:
Contract SAM
= annual TAM × vessel share × role share

runs.text: = events × per-event cost × vessel share × role share

text_body.plain_text:
Event SAM
= events × per-event cost × vessel share × role share

runs.text: = modeled spend × vessel share × role share

text_body.plain_text:
Europe SAM
= modeled spend × vessel share × role share

runs.text: = contract SAM + event SAM − Pacific MRIS overlap

text_body.plain_text:
U.S. SAM
= contract SAM + event SAM − Pacific MRIS overlap

runs.text: SAM is a suitability filter, not a penetration rate.
Rows must pass both gates: vessel-related work and ASV-suitable role.

text_body.plain_text:
SAM is a suitability filter, not a penetration rate.
Rows must pass both gates: vessel-related work and ASV-suitable role.

runs.text: The treatment logic is conservative by design.
Sensing, relay, monitoring, and patrol-like support count; platform replacement, safety authority, and enforcement do not.

The treatment logic is conservative by design.
Sensing, relay, monitoring, and patrol-like support count; platform replacement, safety authority, and enforcement do not.
